page: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-80 is a compute-optimized virtual machine instance configured with 80 vCPUs and 80 GB of RAM. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features an Intel Xeon CPU operating at 2.8 GHz, comprising 40 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The processor includes a cache hierarchy of 32 KB L1d, 1.0 MB L2, and 33 MB L3 cache. This instance does not include local storage or bundled GPU accelerators, and it is provisioned with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core CPU and PassMark CPU scores placing in the top 25 percent. Memory bandwidth is also highly efficient, registering strong read and write speeds for both small and large blocks, alongside a strong PassMark memory score. Single-core performance is moderate, as evidenced by average ratings in stress-ng single-core, Geekbench single-core, and single-threaded gzip compression. While multi-threaded bzip3 decompression and database operations perform strongly, single-threaded decompression and LLM text generation speeds for small and medium models fall into the lower 25 percent percentile.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the n2-highcpu-80 offers a high density of dedicated compute resources relative to its memory footprint, making it a viable option for CPU-bound workloads that do not require massive RAM arrays. The lack of local storage and GPUs limits its applicability for direct high-speed local database storage or hardware-accelerated machine learning training. However, its strong multi-core capabilities and memory bandwidth make it well-suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, ray tracing, high-throughput Redis operations, and parallel batch processing.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-80 is a compute-optimized virtual machine featuring 80 vCPUs and 80 GB of RAM on an x86_64 architecture. Powered by a 2.8 GHz Intel Xeon processor with 40 physical cores and hyper-threading, this instance delivers strong multi-core CPU performance and high memory bandwidth, as validated by top-tier stress-ng and PassMark benchmarks. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, making it a highly specialized resource for CPU-intensive tasks. While single-core operations and LLM text generation speeds are average to weak, its multi-threaded capabilities and high database operation throughput are highly efficient. The n2-highcpu-80 is best suited for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput Redis deployments.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-80 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server with 80 vCPUs, 80 GB RAM, and a 2.8 GHz Intel Xeon processor, delivering strong multi-core performance for parallel workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2-highcpu-80 is an x86_64 compute-optimized server featuring 80 vCPUs, 80 GB RAM, and strong multi-core performance.
tagline: A high-density, multi-core compute instance designed for parallel processing, software compilation, and high-throughput memory-bound workloads.
bullet_points: 80 vCPUs and 80 GB RAM powered by a 2.8 GHz Intel Xeon processor
Strong multi-core CPU performance and high memory read/write bandwidth
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Optimized for multi-threaded applications, software compilation, and ray tracing
Highly efficient for high-throughput Redis and database operations
